title: Mining Environmental Debate
description: Environmental claims about Bitcoin mining depend heavily on system boundaries, attribution methods, and counterfactual assumptions. A strong view should engage both best critiques and strongest rebuttals.

resources.notes: Protocol baseline to avoid category errors in environmental arguments.
